🔥 Welcome to Hot Arcade Games! The adult mini-game portal where fun and desire meet in retro arcade style.

🎉 Party Mode: Perfect for groups of friends ready to laugh and dare. Discover drinking games, daring challenges, and spicy surprises.

NEWS.TITLE: 🔥 News and Updates 🔥

UPDATES.text: 🍺 New game *Never Have I Ever* — 34 adult confessions with a drink counter across 3 intensity levels (Naughty, Hot, Extreme) 😈
👑 New game *King's Cup* — Digital Ring of Fire with 13 spicy rules for the boldest party 🔥
🔥 New game *Confess It All* — sexual confessions, positions, places and body parts across 40 daring questions in 3 levels. 💦
🏆 New game *Hot Confessions* — Never Have I Ever, dares and truths for your hottest parties 😈
🆚 *Would You Rather?* is live — 36 spicy questions across 4 intensity levels for couples 🔥
🎭 New game *Fantasy Cards* — reveal a random fantasy with a card flip animation 😈
💋 Added the *Extreme Mode* in *Kiss Roulette* and new visuals for the *Oral Kamasutra* 😏
🎲 New challenges and mini-games for *Couple Mode* and *Party Mode* 🔥

TRUTH_OR_DARE.TITLE: 🎯 Truth or Dare
TRUTH_OR_DARE.DESCRIPTION: Spin the wheel and let fate play with you... 😜
TRUTH_OR_DARE.HOW_1: Press 'Spin' and the wheel will choose Truth or Dare.
TRUTH_OR_DARE.HOW_2: If it lands on TRUTH, the group or your partner asks you a question.
TRUTH_OR_DARE.HOW_3: If it lands on DARE, the group decides a challenge for you.
TRUTH_OR_DARE.HOW_4: No filters! Answer honestly or complete the dare, no excuses.
TRUTH_OR_DARE.TRUTH_DESCRIPTION:
😏 You got TRUTH...
Your partner or the group can ask you anything.
No filters, no excuses... answer honestly or face a penalty! 🔥
TRUTH_OR_DARE.DARE_DESCRIPTION:
🔥 Now your partner or the group has the power...
They’ll decide your dare, and you must do it — no excuses 😈.
Make it daring, fun, or a little naughty! 💋

SPIN_BEER.TITLE: 🎲 Quick Shots
SPIN_BEER.SUBTITLE: Roll the dice and find out who drinks
SPIN_BEER.HOW_1: Roll both dice by pressing the button.
SPIN_BEER.HOW_2: Based on the total, someone in the group drinks.
SPIN_BEER.HOW_3: Special doubles: Double 1 or 6 = everyone drinks.
SPIN_BEER.HOW_4: Pass the turn to the next player.

7.name: Left drinks
7.desc: The person to your left drinks

8.name: Right drinks
8.desc: The person to your right drinks

DOUBLE1.name: All drink
DOUBLE1.desc: Everyone drinks and you roll again

DOUBLE6.name: All drink
DOUBLE6.desc: Everyone drinks and you roll again

RULES_LIST.description: All drink and roller rolls again

ROULETTE.TITLE: 🎰 Hot Roulette
ROULETTE.DESCRIPTION: Spin the wheel and wait for the result. Then press 'Start' to begin the timer.
ROULETTE.HOW_1: Press 'Spin' to spin the roulette wheel.
ROULETTE.HOW_2: Wait for the result to appear.
ROULETTE.HOW_4: Complete the dare before time runs out!

desprendete.title: Let Loose
desprendete.description: Spin the wheel and complete the dares or answer the truths.
desprendete.needTwoPlayers: You need at least 2 players to start.
desprendete.rulesContent: Each player spins the wheel. If it lands on TRUTH, they must answer the question; if it lands on DARE, they must complete the challenge. The goal is to have fun, loosen up, and be bold!

INSTRUCTIONS.TITLE: How to Play - Kiss Roulette
INSTRUCTIONS.STEP1_DESC: Add at least 2 players with their names and genders
INSTRUCTIONS.STEP2_DESC: Select kiss duration and whether to include intimate parts
INSTRUCTIONS.STEP3_DESC: Each player spins to discover which body part to kiss and who to kiss
INSTRUCTIONS.STEP4_DESC: Press 'Start Kiss' and perform the action for the selected time
INSTRUCTIONS.STEP5_DESC: Continue with the next player and repeat the fun
INSTRUCTIONS.STEP6_DESC: Intimate parts are included in the results.
INSTRUCTIONS.STEP7_DESC: Actions such as licking, biting, sucking are included in the results.
INSTRUCTIONS.TIP1: All participants must agree with the rules
INSTRUCTIONS.TIP2: You can skip intimate parts if you prefer a softer game
INSTRUCTIONS.TIP4: Have fun and create memorable moments!

COUNTDOWN.COUNTDOWN_LABEL: The kiss ends when it reaches zero!

INSTRUCTIONS.TITLE: Higher or Lower Shot
INSTRUCTIONS.STEP1_SIMPLE: Player A reveals the first card
INSTRUCTIONS.STEP3_SIMPLE: Second card is revealed and verified
INSTRUCTIONS.STEP1_ROULETTE: Roulette selects Player A and Player B
INSTRUCTIONS.STEP2_ROULETTE: Player A reveals, Player B guesses
INSTRUCTIONS.STEP1_DESC: Choose between Simple Mode or Roulette Mode based on number of players
INSTRUCTIONS.STEP2_DESC: The first player reveals a card from the deck
INSTRUCTIONS.STEP3_DESC: The second player says 'Higher' or 'Lower' before revealing the next card
INSTRUCTIONS.STEP4_DESC: Compare both card values and the loser drinks

ROULETTE_HOT_PARTY.TITLE: Hot Party Roulette 🎯
ROULETTE_HOT_PARTY.DESCRIPTION: Spin the wheel and see who drinks, who loses a piece of clothing, or who faces a daring truth. Let the party begin!
ROULETTE_HOT_PARTY.HOW_2: Press 'Spin' to spin the roulette wheel.
ROULETTE_HOT_PARTY.HOW_3: The person chosen must complete the dare.

RESULTS.TRUTH: Pick a daring question from the group 💋

FANTASY_CARDS.TITLE: Fantasy Cards
FANTASY_CARDS.SUBTITLE: Reveal a random fantasy and live the moment together 🔥
FANTASY_CARDS.HOW_1: Choose an intensity level: Soft to ease in, Extreme for the bold.
FANTASY_CARDS.HOW_3: Tap the card to reveal a random fantasy.
FANTASY_CARDS.HOW_4: Talk about it: would you like to make it happen? When and how?
FANTASY_CARDS.HOW_5: No pressure — if someone wants to skip, just tap 'Next'.

WOULD_YOU_RATHER.TITLE: Would You Rather?
WOULD_YOU_RATHER.SUBTITLE: Pick between two options and discover your answer together 🔥
WOULD_YOU_RATHER.HOW_1: Choose intensity: Romantic to ease in, Extreme for the limitless.
WOULD_YOU_RATHER.HOW_2: The active player taps the card to reveal the question.
WOULD_YOU_RATHER.HOW_3: Each player picks their option and shares it with the group.
WOULD_YOU_RATHER.HOW_4: Debate why you each chose what you chose — the more detail, the more fun!
WOULD_YOU_RATHER.HOW_5: Whoever refuses to answer drinks or receives a dare from the group.

HOT_CONFESSIONS.TITLE: Hot Confessions
HOT_CONFESSIONS.SUBTITLE: Never Have I Ever, dares and truths for your hot party 🏆
HOT_CONFESSIONS.HOW_1: Choose card types (Never Have I Ever, Dare, Truth) and the intensity you want.
HOT_CONFESSIONS.HOW_2: Turns pass from player to player.
HOT_CONFESSIONS.HOW_3: Tap to reveal the card. The active player acts based on the type drawn.
HOT_CONFESSIONS.HOW_4: Never Have I Ever: who has done it drinks. Dare: do it. Truth: answer honestly.
HOT_CONFESSIONS.HOW_5: Whoever refuses, the group decides the penalty.

CONFIESA_TODO.TITLE: Confess It All
CONFIESA_TODO.SUBTITLE: Confessions, positions, places and body parts 🔥
CONFIESA_TODO.HOW_1: Choose categories (Confession, Position, Place, Body Parts) and intensity.
CONFIESA_TODO.HOW_2: Turns pass from player to player.
CONFIESA_TODO.HOW_3: Tap the card and the active player answers with total honesty.
CONFIESA_TODO.HOW_4: Confession: say if you've done it. Position/Place/Parts: the more detail the better.
CONFIESA_TODO.HOW_5: Whoever refuses to confess, the group decides the penalty (drink, dare, etc.).

KINGS_CUP.TITLE: King's Cup
KINGS_CUP.SUBTITLE: Ring of Fire — 13 hot rules for your party 👑
KINGS_CUP.HOW_1: Place cups around the King's Cup in the center of the table.
KINGS_CUP.HOW_2: Each player takes turns tapping the screen to draw a card.
KINGS_CUP.HOW_3: Every card has a different rule — read it and follow it!
KINGS_CUP.HOW_4: The first 3 Kings pour drink into the center cup; the 4th must drink it all.
KINGS_CUP.HOW_5: "Devil" (6): the active player makes up a hot house rule that lasts the whole game.

YO_NUNCA.TITLE: Never Have I Ever
YO_NUNCA.SUBTITLE: With drink counter — 34 adult confessions in 3 levels 🍺
YO_NUNCA.HOW_1: Choose intensity: Naughty to ease in, Extreme for the most daring.
YO_NUNCA.HOW_2: Each player takes turns tapping the screen to reveal a card.
YO_NUNCA.HOW_3: Read the "Never Have I Ever..." statement. Everyone who HAS done it drinks.
YO_NUNCA.HOW_4: The number of sips on the card is the suggested amount to drink.
YO_NUNCA.HOW_5: Tap "I drank 🍺" to update the session drink counter.
